name: Take-Two Interactive
analysis: It is coming off a base, 10% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry $239.5700, stop $203.9400, target $346.4600 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
